behavior_summary: U8P_WTABLE::look is a simple inspect/U8P_WTABLE::look handler that shows the player-facing text "table" when the object is examined and then suspends/ends the U8P_WTABLE::look process.

U8P_WTABLE::gotHit is a small utility invoked when the item is hit/triggered. It examines its first parameter (param1) and, if that parameter is false/zero, calls Item::setFrame(0x01, this) to change the item's visual frame/state. The second parameter exists in the signature but is not referenced in the provided excerpt.
notable_control_flow: U8P_WTABLE::look: linear flow — emit a single bark "table" then suspend/return.
U8P_WTABLE::gotHit: conditional branch on first parameter (param1). If param1 == 0 (false), call Item::setFrame(0x01, this); otherwise do nothing and return.
open_questions: What external systems call U8P_WTABLE::gotHit (which game events/attack sources)?
What is the semantic meaning of U8P_WTABLE::gotHit's second parameter (word) — currently unused in the excerpt?
Is U8P_WTABLE::look ever invoked as a fast-area enter/leave event, or only via explicit player inspect actions?

main_function.name: U8P_WTABLE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player examines or 'looks at' the object (display the text "table").
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player inspects or 'looks at' this object (engine U8P_WTABLE::look/inspect action).

function_map.name: U8P_WTABLE::look
function_map.role: Player-facing inspect handler that emits a short description/bark.

function_map.name: U8P_WTABLE::gotHit
function_map.role: Utility hit/trigger handler that conditionally updates the item's visual frame.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Engine/item API used to change the item's display frame/state.

external_calls.purpose: Change the item's display/frame to 0x01 to reflect damage/state change.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_WTABLE::look is a simple inspect/U8P_WTABLE::look handler that shows the player-facing text "table" when the object is examined and then suspends/ends the U8P_WTABLE::look process.
